testcase.name: test_measurements_have_ordem_field_and_sorted_asc

failure.message: AssertionError: measurement missing 'ordem': {'id': '17cf7b2b-5dca-4a77-aeb6-b38f6197e923', 'machine_id': '0ad323dc-009a-4a19-abce-abb1d8dacf4f', 'machine_tag': 'BBA-0001 / Motor', 'subconjunto': 'Motor', 'ponto': '1HA', 'valor': 2.3, 'unidade': 'G', 'deteccao': 'PICO', 'data': '2026-07-02T11:46:42.249039+00:00', 'alarme': 'A1'} assert 'ordem' in {'id': '17cf7b2b-5dca-4a77-aeb6-b38f6197e923', 'machine_id': '0ad323dc-009a-4a19-abce-abb1d8dacf4f', 'machine_tag': 'BBA-0001 / Motor', 'subconjunto': 'Motor', ...}
